notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Tyler Mahle picks off Ke'Bryan Hayes at 2nd on throw to second baseman Luis Arraez.

notableEvents.label: Elly De La Cruz flarest HR
2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game

notableEvents.label: Allowed 109.3 mph
notableEvents.detail: Elly De La Cruz · Home Run

notableEvents.label: Casey Schmitt GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Casey Schmitt grounds into a double play, shortstop Elly De La Cruz to second baseman Matt McLain to first baseman Sal Stewart. Luis Arraez out at 2nd. Casey Schmitt out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Heliot Ramos pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heliot Ramos singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Rece Hinds. Rafael Devers scores. Daniel Susac to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jerar Encarnacion pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jerar Encarnacion singles on a ground ball to right fielder Rece Hinds. Daniel Susac to 3rd. Heliot Ramos to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jerar Encarnacion pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jerar Encarnacion flies out to right fielder Rece Hinds.
